home.title: FewUI
home.tagline: AI-native UI framework for teams that ship with agents.
home.description: Components, design tokens, Cursor rules, and agent skills — one system for humans and AI to build consistent interfaces.
home.techBody: Vue 3, CSS custom properties, Tailwind preset, vue-i18n, and runtime theming designed for Restta-scale products.
